query:
WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT 
    r.id AS request_id,
    r.employee_id,
    r.priority,
    e.seniority_date,
    FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), e.seniority_date) / 365.25) AS seniority_years,
    CASE WHEN FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), e.seniority_date) / 365.25) < 5 THEN 'Junior (0-4y)'
         WHEN FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), e.seniority_date) / 365.25) < 10 THEN 'Mid (5-9y)'
         WHEN FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), e.seniority_date) / 365.25) < 20 THEN 'Senior (10-19y)'
         ELSE 'Veteran (20y+)' END AS band,
    rd.date,
    e.shift,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY rd.date, e.shift
      ORDER BY r.priority ASC, e.seniority_date ASC
    ) AS rank_in_shift
  FROM requests r
  JOIN employees e ON r.employee_id = e.id
  JOIN request_dates rd ON rd.request_id = r.id
  WHERE r.request_type = 'vacation'
    AND r.status = 'pending'
    AND r.priority = 1
    AND (e.category != 'ancillary' OR e.category IS NULL)
    AND e.is_active = 1
)
SELECT 
  band,
  COUNT(DISTINCT request_id) AS p1_requests,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN rank_in_shift <= 8 THEN request_id END) AS within_cap,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN rank_in_shift <= 8 THEN request_id END) / COUNT(DISTINCT request_id), 1) AS cap_access_pct
FROM ranked
GROUP BY band
ORDER BY FIELD(band, 'Junior (0-4y)', 'Mid (5-9y)', 'Senior (10-19y)', 'Veteran (20y+)');
